LootWeaponVnums.brief: A set of constants representing the virtual numbers (vnums) for various wieldable weapon types in the game.
LootWeaponVnums.details: The LootWeaponVnums group defines constant integer values corresponding to the unique virtual numbers assigned to different weapon objects that characters can wield within the game. These vnums serve as identifiers for specific weapon items stored in the game's object database, enabling consistent spawning, management, and interaction logic. The group includes constants for a variety of weapon categories such as axes, daggers, exotic weapons, flails, maces, polearms, spears, swords, whips, and bows. By organizing these vnums into a dedicated collection, the codebase ensures maintainability, reduces errors associated with hardcoded values, and promotes clear, standardized referencing across different modules and systems.
LootWeaponVnums.notes: This grouping emphasizes the importance of using named constants for object identification rather than hardcoded numbers, supporting maintainability and reducing potential errors. The constants are organized by weapon type, facilitating easy updates and extensions when new weapon types are added.
LootWeaponVnums.rationale: Having a centralized set of vnum constants for wieldable weapons simplifies object management and ensures consistency across the game's systems. It allows developers to reference weapon types reliably, supports easier updates, and helps maintain a clear mapping between in-game items and their identifiers, thereby integrating seamlessly into the overall item handling and loot management architecture.
LootWeaponVnums.name: LootWeaponVnums

OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_AXE.brief: The constant representing the object vnum for the wieldable axe weapon.
OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_AXE.details: This constant defines the unique object vnum (virtual number) for the axe weapon that players can wield in the game. It is initialized with the value 24370 and is used throughout the codebase to identify, spawn, and manage this specific axe item. By using this constant, the code maintains consistency when referencing the axe weapon across various systems such as inventory management, combat, and item handling. It serves as a reliable identifier for the predefined axe object within the game's item database.
OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_AXE.notes: The constant is stored as a compile-time constexpr, ensuring efficient and immutable reference throughout the program. Its usage pattern typically involves passing or comparing this vnum when creating or checking for the wieldable axe object.
OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_AXE.rationale: This constant exists to provide a clear, maintainable, and error-resistant way to reference the specific axe weapon object within the game systems, facilitating consistent item management and reducing the risk of using magic numbers.
OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_AXE.name: OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_AXE

OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_DAGGER.brief: The constant representing the object vnum for the dagger weapon used when wielded by a character.
OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_DAGGER.details: This constant defines the unique object vnum (virtual number) assigned to the dagger weapon item within the game. It is initialized with the value 24371, which corresponds to the specific in-game dagger object. The constant is utilized throughout the codebase whenever the dagger weapon needs to be referenced, such as during spawning, equipping, or inventory management. It resides within the LootWeaponVnums namespace, which organizes various weapon vnum constants for consistent and clear identification of weapon objects in the game's systems.
OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_DAGGER.notes: The vnum is a fixed identifier used for referencing the dagger object across different modules, ensuring uniformity in object handling and reducing errors related to hardcoded values.
OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_DAGGER.rationale: This constant exists to provide a clear, maintainable way to reference the dagger weapon's object vnum, facilitating consistent object creation and management when characters wield daggers.
OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_DAGGER.name: OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_DAGGER

OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_EXOTIC.brief: Constant representing the object vnum for exotic weapons that can be wielded by players.
OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_EXOTIC.details: This constant holds the virtual number (vnum) 24372, uniquely identifying the in-game object associated with wielding exotic weapons. It is used throughout the codebase to reference this specific item type when spawning, validating, or managing exotic weapon objects. By centralizing this vnum, the code ensures consistent handling of exotic weapons across inventory systems, equipment checks, and game logic related to weapon usage.
OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_EXOTIC.notes: The constant is defined as a compile-time constexpr, ensuring efficient and type-safe usage. It is typically used in conjunction with functions that spawn or verify item types based on vnums.
OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_EXOTIC.rationale: The constant exists to provide a clear, maintainable reference to the exotic weapon object vnum, facilitating consistent handling and reducing errors associated with hardcoded values in multiple locations.
OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_EXOTIC.name: OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_EXOTIC

OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_FLAIL.brief: The constant stores the object vnum for the wielded flail weapon used in the game.
OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_FLAIL.details: This constant defines the unique virtual number (vnum) assigned to the wielded flail weapon object, facilitating its identification and management within the game systems. Initialized with the value 24373, it is referenced in various modules for spawning, equipping, and handling the flail weapon. By using this constant, the code maintains consistency when referring to this specific weapon type across inventory, combat, and object management routines.
OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_FLAIL.notes: The vnum is a fixed identifier that ensures reliable referencing of the flail weapon object throughout the codebase, avoiding hardcoded values and improving maintainability.
OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_FLAIL.rationale: This constant exists to provide a clear, maintainable way to identify the wielded flail weapon object, supporting consistent spawning and interaction logic within the game environment.
OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_FLAIL.name: OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_FLAIL

OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_MACE.brief: The constant representing the object vnum for the wielded mace weapon in the game.
OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_MACE.details: This constant stores the unique object vnum (virtual number) used to identify the wielded mace weapon within the game's object database. OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_MACE.notes: The constant is defined as a compile-time constexpr, ensuring its value remains immutable and optimized throughout the program execution.
OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_MACE.rationale: This constant exists to provide a clear, maintainable reference to the specific mace object vnum, facilitating consistent weapon handling and reducing the risk of errors associated with hardcoded values.
OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_MACE.name: OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_MACE

OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_POLEARM.brief: The constant represents the object vnum for the polearm weapon used when wielding a polearm.

By using this constant, the code maintains consistency in identifying polearm weapons, facilitating easier updates and reducing errors related to hardcoded values.
OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_POLEARM.notes: The constant is stored as a constexpr integer, ensuring compile-time evaluation and type safety. It serves as a standardized reference point for all polearm-related object handling in the game systems.
OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_POLEARM.rationale: This constant exists to provide a clear, maintainable way to identify polearm objects within the game's code, supporting consistent behavior when players equip or interact with polearm weapons.

OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_SWORD.brief: The constant representing the object vnum for a wielded sword item in the game.

OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_SWORD.name: OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_SWORD

OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_WHIP.brief: The constant stores the virtual number identifier for the wielded whip object in the game.

OBJ_VNUM_WIELD_BOW.brief: The constant representing the object vnum for the bow weapon used in the game.
